subject: The Brain Fridge
fact: A freezing chamber within the lair is kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice.
source_quote: A freezing chamber within the lair kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice

subject: block of opaque ice
fact: A large block of opaque ice is used to preserve suspended brains in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: containing a large block of opaque ice used to preserve suspended brains

subject: small vials of yellowish liquid
fact: Small vials of yellowish liquid are contained in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: hidden copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols is located in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: Rogue Thought's Chamber is a large room decorated with graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes.
source_quote: A large room decorated with graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center of Rogue Thought's Chamber.
source_quote: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The acoustics in Rogue Thought's Chamber are so sharp that even the quietest whisper can be plainly heard.
source_quote: the acoustics are so sharp that even the quietest whisper can be plainly heard

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party reported their success to the Mind Flayer who hired them at Sporedome.
source_quote: the party reported their success to the Mind Flayer who hired them

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party received their reward from the Mind Flayer at Sporedome.
source_quote: received their reward

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party met with Isthana in Hillsfar to discuss starting a business.
source_quote: the party met with Isthana to discuss starting a business

subject: Akritas mission
fact: Akritas received a new mission from the Emerald Enclave in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Akritas received a new mission from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress.
source_quote: being near an abundance of Faerzress

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants currently control Szith Morcane.
source_quote: currently controlled by fire giants

subject: fire giant threat
fact: Fire giants are nearing completion of their work and threatening to invade the surface.
source_quote: nearing completion of their work and threatening to invade the surface

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was found bound and tormented in the lair.
source_quote: found bound and tormented in the lair

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was suffering from demonic madness.
source_quote: suffering from demonic madness

subject: Arrizz cured
fact: A piece of magical mushroom cured Arrizz of his demonic madness.
source_quote: cured by a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer.
source_quote: agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer

subject: Arrizz departure
fact: Arrizz parted ways with the party at Sporedome with a wry farewell.
source_quote: parted ways at Sporedome with a wry farewell

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum initially claimed to be an innocent traveler.
source_quote: initially claimed to be an innocent traveler

subject: Thera confession
fact: Under intimidation, Thera Grabelthum admitted to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: admitted to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera flight
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled during the ambush.
source_quote: turned invisible and fled during the ambush

subject: Thera death
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos.
source_quote: was killed in the chaos

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Githyanki Warriors used greatswords and teleportation to fight the party.
source_quote: used greatswords and teleportation to fight the party

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Some Githyanki Warriors served as guards in the lair.
source_quote: Some served as guards in the lair

subject: Arrizz torment
fact: Githyanki Warriors were found tormenting Arrizz.
source_quote: others were found tormenting Arrizz

subject: Githyanki skull crack
fact: One Githyanki warrior's skull cracked open to reveal a hidden intellect devourer.
source_quote: One of their skulls cracked open to reveal a hidden intellect devourer

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull.
source_quote: emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull

subject: psychic blast
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: intellect devourer destruction
fact: The intellect devourer was destroyed by the party.
source_quote: being destroyed by the party

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was found in his inner sanctum sipping from decorative brain jars.
source_quote: found in his inner sanctum sipping from decorative brain jars

subject: Rogue Thought service
fact: Rogue Thought was served by Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: He was served by Githyanki warriors

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt.
source_quote: appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought communicated telepathically.
source_quote: communicated telepathically

subject: Rogue Thought self-mutilation
fact: When brought near death by the party, Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles.
source_quote: severed his own tentacles

subject: Rogue Thought escape
fact: Rogue Thought plane shifted away after severing his tentacles.
source_quote: plane shifted away

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed revenge after escaping.
source_quote: vowing revenge

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned by the intellect devourer's psychic blast.
source_quote: was stunned by the intellect devourer's psychic blast

subject: Owlbear healing
fact: The Owlbear was healed during a short rest.
source_quote: healed during a short rest

subject: Owlbear charge
fact: The Owlbear charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought.
source_quote: charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a drow archmage referenced at the end of the session.
source_quote: A drow archmage referenced at the end of the session

subject: Solom declaration
fact: Solom Ned'razak declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra.
source_quote: declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the powerful and influential head of the criminal element in Hillsfar.
source_quote: head of the criminal element in Hillsfar

subject: Isthana invitation
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner.
source_quote: invited the party to a private dinner

subject: Isthana patronage offer
fact: Isthana offered patronage and protection for any business the party might start.
source_quote: offered patronage and protection for any business they might start

subject: Isthana warning
fact: Isthana made clear that ventures without her support would not fare well.
source_quote: ventures without her support would not fare well

subject: Isthana co-option
fact: Isthana sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city.
source_quote: sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow wizard mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message.
source_quote: A Drow wizard mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message

subject: Murssvayas return
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv returned to his people.
source_quote: having returned to his people

subject: Murssvayas invitation
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane to lead the resistance against the fire giants.
source_quote: ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane to lead the resistance against the fire giants

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The party used a piece of the Magical Mushroom to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness.
source_quote: used by the party to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness

subject: Opals
fact: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each were discovered among the treasures in the lair.
source_quote: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each, discovered among the treasures in the lair

subject: Circlet
fact: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces was discovered by the party while searching the lair.
source_quote: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces discovered by the party while searching the lair

subject: Chainmail Pouch
fact: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces was found among the loot in the lair.
source_quote: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces, found among the loot in the lair

subject: Copper Plate
fact: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side was found hidden within the icy chamber.
source_quote: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side, found hidden within the icy chamber

subject: Brains
fact: The party collected enough brains to place one at each of the magically sealed doors.
source_quote: collected enough of them to place one at each of the magically sealed doors

subject: door unlocking
fact: Placing a brain at each of the magically sealed doors unlocked entry to the final chamber.
source_quote: unlocking entry to the final chamber

subject: Brain Jars
fact: Rogue Thought was consuming his grisly meals from the Brain Jars when the party entered his chamber.
source_quote: from which Rogue Thought was consuming his grisly meals when the party entered his chamber

subject: Mind Flayer Tentacles
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles before escaping via plane shift.
source_quote: Severed from Rogue Thought before he escaped via plane shift

subject: tentacle presentation
fact: The party presented the Mind Flayer Tentacles to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory.
source_quote: presented these to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory over the rogue

subject: Wand of the War Mage +2
fact: The Mind Flayer gifted the Wand of the War Mage +2 to Felkur in Sporedome as a reward.
source_quote: gifted to Felkur by the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as a reward

subject: Wand of the War Mage +2
fact: The Wand of the War Mage +2 upgraded Felkur's previous wand of the war mage +1.
source_quote: upgrading his previous wand of the war mage +1

subject: Rare Wine
fact: Isthana brought three bottles of exquisite and rare wine to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine brought by Isthana as a gift to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar

subject: wine purpose
fact: The Rare Wine was used to foster goodwill and open negotiations.
source_quote: used to foster goodwill and open negotiations

subject: Brain-capped Mushrooms
fact: Brain-capped Mushrooms were secured by the party according to the Emerald Enclave's message.
source_quote: having been secured by the party

subject: mushroom purpose
fact: The Brain-capped Mushrooms serve as a defense against the madness of Graz'zt.
source_quote: serving as a defense against the madness of Graz'zt

subject: Spirit Guardians casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians multiple times throughout the session.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim multiple times throughout the session

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The spectral protectors from Spirit Guardians surrounded Bramgrim and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy.
source_quote: surrounded him and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians slowing
fact: Spirit Guardians slowed several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: also slowing several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws

subject: Firebolt casting
fact: Felkur used Firebolt to incinerate the intellect devourer.
source_quote: Used by Felkur to incinerate the intellect devourer

subject: Firebolt damage
fact: Felkur used Firebolt to damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoning
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spiritual Weapon to manifest a floating weapon.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim to manifest a floating weapon

subject: Spiritual Weapon attack
fact: The Spiritual Weapon attacked through walls of the lair.
source_quote: attacking through walls of the lair

subject: Misty Step usage
fact: Multiple Githyanki Warriors used Misty Step to instantly teleport across the battlefield.
source_quote: Used by multiple Githyanki warriors to instantly teleport across the battlefield

subject: Misty Step purpose
fact: Githyanki Warriors used Misty Step primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians.
source_quote: primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians

subject: Fireball casting
fact: Felkur unleashed Fireball in the final chamber.
source_quote: Unleashed by Felkur in the final chamber

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The Fireball caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius.
source_quote: caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The Fireball dealt heavy damage to most of the Mind Flayer and Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: dealing heavy damage to most of them

subject: Hunter's Mark application
fact: Akritas applied Hunter's Mark to track her target.
source_quote: Applied by Akritas to track her target

subject: Hunter's Mark effect
fact: Hunter's Mark increased the lethality of Akritas's arrow strikes during combat.
source_quote: increase the lethality of her arrow strikes during combat

subject: Plane Shift usage
fact: Rogue Thought used Plane Shift to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death.
source_quote: Used by Rogue Thought to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death

subject: Toll the Dead casting
fact: Bramgrim used Toll the Dead to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: used by Bramgrim to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior

subject: Toll the Dead damage
fact: Toll the Dead dealt heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe.
source_quote: dealing heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe
